---
title: "Natalie O'Shea"
image: "images/oshea_headshot.JPG"
color1: "#5A59A3"
color2: "#C66060"
angle: 130
links:
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/natalieoshea"
  - label: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/_natalie_oshea"
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/natalie-oshea/"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:ms.natalieoshea@gmail.com"
output:
  postcards::jolla
site: distill::distill_website
---
 
Natalie O’Shea is a researcher and data visualization specialist with a passion for equity, accessibility, and human-centered design. She has worked in academic, government, and industry contexts and brings her passion for using data to help drive more equitable outcomes into all of these arenas.
